modules.name: Professional Summary
modules.content: **Backend Java Developer** building **Spring Boot microservices** with **Spring Security**, **Spring Data JPA**, and **PostgreSQL**. Created demo products including a **task automation platform** with **real-time updates** and a **document rendering engine** with **dynamic layout calculation**. Strong background in **Java fundamentals**, API design, and structured backend development. Focused on **scalable architecture**, **maintainable code**, and **developer productivity**.

modules.name: Technical Skills
items: **Backend (Spring):** Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA (*Hibernate*), Spring Security, Validation, Lombok, MapStruct
**API & Security:** REST design, Swagger/**OpenAPI**, Jackson, stateless authentication, role-based authorization, **JWT**, BCrypt, CORS, request validation
**Core Java:** OOP, Collections, Streams API, Multithreading/Concurrency (*ExecutorService*, *CompletableFuture*), JDBC, IO/NIO, Optional, Record
**Testing & Debugging:** JUnit 5, AssertJ, Mockito, logging, Postman
**Tools & Delivery:** Git/GitHub, Maven, Docker, Docker Compose, Flyway

modules.name: Education & Certifications
items: **Spring Boot Backend Engineering** – *Ongoing* | Jan 2025 – Present - Building REST APIs, DTO mapping, validation, authentication, and production-style backend modules.
**SQL and Relational Database Design** – Self-Study | Sep 2024 – Dec 2024 - Schema design, joins, transactions, indexes, constraints, and query optimization basics.
**Advanced Java Programming** – Self-Study | Jun 2024 – Aug 2024 - Concurrency, Streams API, exception handling, generics, JDBC, and functional programming patterns.
**BSc in Computer Systems Engineering** – Northbridge Technical University, UK | Sep 2018 – Jun 2022 (*Grade: 2.1*)

modules.name: Projects
items: **TaskFlow Studio** *(Spring Boot + React + AI)* – Demo full-stack platform for managing internal workflows and generating automated task suggestions. Implemented **JWT authentication**, task pipelines, **real-time progress updates**, and configurable dashboards. Integrated AI-assisted content generation with structured **JSON-based responses**. Stack: Java 21, Spring Boot, Spring Security, JPA, PostgreSQL, Docker Compose.

**RenderGrid Engine** *(Java/Kotlin Document Layout Engine)* – Demo library for declarative PDF rendering using a modular layout system. Built support for nested containers, spacing, alignment, and **automatic pagination** with multi-page splitting. Stack: Java 21 / Kotlin, Apache **PDFBox**, Flexmark, SnakeYAML.

**Inventory Control API** *(Spring Boot + JWT + JPA)* – Demo backend for warehouse item management. Built secure endpoints for stock operations, categories, and reporting with **CRUD**, validation, and DTO mapping. Documented APIs with Swagger/**OpenAPI**. Stack: Spring Boot, Spring Security, JPA, MySQL, Flyway, Postman.

**NovaAI Client** *(Java Integration Library)* – Demo Java client for an AI text platform. Supports request configuration, **streaming responses**, structured **JSON parsing**, and reusable service integration patterns.

modules.name: Professional Experience
items: **Operations Coordinator**, BrightWave Services, Manchester, UK | *May 2023 – Present* - Coordinated daily operations, improved team communication, and maintained consistency in a fast-paced service environment.

**Technical Team Lead**, NovaBuild Solutions, Leeds, UK | *Jul 2019 – Apr 2023* - Led task planning, quality control, and execution across multiple internal projects; supported onboarding and mentoring of junior team members.

modules.name: Additional Information
items: **Work Eligibility:** Eligible to work in the UK
